_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Tok pren, na kam insait.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan i bin wokim olsem olgeta tok ples inap lukim. Wanwan tok ples i gat wanpela prais bilong tanim tok.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lis tok ples na rei bilong Marks em nau tasol. Marks em token bilong painim, no share.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Tanim Liana Banyan long {{language}}. Kisim {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Mak bilong wokabaut na tok bilong bagarap
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Namba wan tok ples -- prais i no nidim.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Tok Bilong Namba Wan Man: Bilong Wanem Dispela Tok
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Wanwan tok long dispela ples i gat nem bilong wanem. 26 nem i olsem.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Olsem Wanem Prais Tanim Tok i Wok
speakFriend.step1Body: Opim Prais Tanim Tok long Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Tanim olgeta lain i nidim. Salim long Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Bihain long orait, kisim Marks na IP Ledger i raitim.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Tokim pren, i go insait."

languageSwitcher.tip: Yusim tok hait bilong narapela tok ples long dua Durin bilong opim samting nupela!
